title: Scaffold rvagent-engine crate implementing TaskRunner
acceptance_criteria: crate is a member of the rvAgent workspace family|cargo check -p rvagent-engine passes|cargo clippy -p rvagent-engine --all-targets -- -D warnings is clean|provides a stub impl of rvagent_a2a::TaskRunner (run + cancel)
rollback_plan: git rm the new crate dir; revert the workspace Cargo.toml member addition

title: Heal the dual-workspace shadow (contradiction 9.4)
acceptance_criteria: exactly one workspace owns each crate; no 'believes it's in a workspace' error|meta agent/ crate builds in-tree|no crate or capability dropped (superset)
rollback_plan: restore both Cargo.toml files from git; no crates deleted

title: WorkOrder <-> TaskSpec anti-corruption adapter (seam S3)
acceptance_criteria: WorkOrder -> TaskSpec -> WorkOrder round-trips losslessly|IntentLock (blake3: hashes) preserved across the round-trip|unit tests cover the mapping incl. status enum and priority
rollback_plan: revert the adapter module; TEASTASK-001 stub remains

title: Canonical schemas -> Rust types via schemars (heal 9.1/9.2)
acceptance_criteria: WorkOrder and ProofRecord Rust types derive schemars::JsonSchema|emitted schema is byte-equal to the checked-in canonical schemas (drift gate)|CSV projection is generated from the type, not hand-maintained
rollback_plan: revert type module; canonical JSON schemas remain the contract

title: gitkb ready -> handoff claim selection wire (seam S2)
acceptance_criteria: given git-kb ready output, the top task maps to a WorkOrder id|hf claim acquires a single-holder lease (CAS)|conflict on an already-claimed task is refused, ledger untouched
rollback_plan: revert selection adapter; gitkb + hf remain independently usable

title: prompt_hub ExecutionPlan -> WorkOrder emitter (seam S1, greenfield)
acceptance_criteria: an ExecutionPlan emits >=1 WorkOrder validating against task_graph.schema.json|dependencies derive from ExecutionStep.dependencies (toposort preserved)|emitted WorkOrders carry a computed IntentLock
rollback_plan: revert the taskgraph module; prompt_hub vibe pipeline unaffected

title: Implement rvagent-engine::run to actually execute a WorkOrder (de-stub the runner)
acceptance_criteria: rvagent-engine::run executes the WorkOrder's work (not an echo) via rvagent-backends|the verification_command runs and its pass/fail is captured as the run verdict|a failing verification yields status failed with failure_reason, never Done|an integration test drives a trivial WorkOrder to a real Done
rollback_plan: revert run() body to the stub; TEASTASK-001 scaffold remains

title: ProofRecord writer to the handoff witnessed ledger (seam S4)
acceptance_criteria: a completed run appends a valid ProofRecord to the ledger|witness chain verifies after append (verify_witness_chain)|replay yields the correct latest status
rollback_plan: ledger is append-only; revert the writer code, leave prior events intact

title: End-to-end proof: one WorkOrder through the unified loop (v1 success gate)
acceptance_criteria: one WorkOrder transitions Backlog -> ... -> Done via a REAL run (TEASTASK-011), not an echo|a ProofRecord for it verifies on the handoff ledger (witness chain)|gate refusals are enforced by their real owners: claim/lease by handoff-lease; network/drift/approval by handoff's fail-closed gate engine (handoff-drift/handoff-policy), not assumed|no Done without proof (ledger authority holds)
rollback_plan: test-only milestone; no production mutation; revert test harness if needed

title: Trajectory capture into sona ReasoningBank (seam S6 learning)
acceptance_criteria: a completed run appends a Trajectory to the ReasoningBank|reward/verdict is recorded per step|recall returns the trajectory by semantic query
rollback_plan: revert the sona wire; ReasoningBank untouched

title: Expose rvagent-engine task ops as MCP tools (rvagent-mcp registry)
acceptance_criteria: MCP tools/list exposes the engine's task operations|tools/call submit->claim->run->proof works over stdio|parity with the hf-mcp surface for the shared operations
rollback_plan: revert the MCP tool registrations; core engine unaffected
